name: emigration-mod-dev
description: Dev-only tooling for the Emigration Civ VII mod (type-check + lint + tests). Not shipped; release.sh excludes it.

scripts.verify: tsc --noEmit && eslint ui && npm run test:game-speed && npm run test:notifications && npm run test:network-anim && npm run test:network-origin && npm run test:event-attribution && npm run test:causes && npm run test:city-readout-data && npm run test:city-readout && npm run test:views && npm run test:migration-page && npm run test:scaling && npm run test:prosperity && npm run test:geography && npm run test:violence && npm run test:tunables && npm run test:migration-stats && npm run test:flow-history && npm run test:composition && npm run test:governance-mask && npm run test:city-scope-global && npm run test:effects && npm run test:civ-tuning && npm run test:war && npm run test:disasters && npm run test:borders && npm run test:naming && npm run test:feedback && npm run test:engine-pull && npm run test:engine-pass && npm run test:dividend && npm run test:raid && npm run test:modinfo && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:no-empty-catch
scripts.test:js: npm run test:causes && npm run test:city-readout-data && npm run test:city-readout && npm run test:views && npm run test:migration-page && npm run test:scaling && npm run test:prosperity && npm run test:geography && npm run test:violence && npm run test:tunables && npm run test:migration-stats && npm run test:effects && npm run test:civ-tuning && npm run test:war && npm run test:disasters && npm run test:borders && npm run test:naming && npm run test:feedback && npm run test:engine-pull && npm run test:engine-pass && npm run test:dividend && npm run test:raid
